technique: contrarian
platforms: [linkedin]
tags: [contrarian, prediction, bold-opinion, strong-hook, comments]
source_month: "2024-06"
---

## Why It Works

This content worked because the 2-line hook was very strong. It will elicit an emotional response from nearly anyone. There are a lot of comments on this post because it's a strong opinion that frustrates many people (for some reason).

## Template

Prediction:
More {Bold prediction from your niche}.
They'll start to view {Alternative way of thinking}.
- {Reason #1}
- {Reason #2}
- {Reason #3}
- {Reason #4}
- {Reason #5}
- {Reason #6}
Remember:
It's {Contrarian Good Thing}.
Not the other way around.
